headline: Hornworm check due tomorrow; 87°F returns Friday.
weather_notes: Water e1–e4, c1–c4, and potato_bags by Thursday — beds last irrigated Jun 8 will be 5 days dry when Friday's 87°F arrives.
Skip w2/w3 garlic zones in Thursday's watering — 87°F Friday accelerates bulb curing with the Jun 21 stop-irrigation deadline 12 days out.
Use today's 77°F window for pest scouting — best inspection conditions before Wednesday warms and Friday's 87°F returns.

surfaced_tasks.title: Inspect for hornworms — apply Bt if found
surfaced_tasks.reason: Due tomorrow — 31-day Amish Paste tomatoes are in peak hornworm window; today's 77°F is ideal for checking lower leaves for frass.

surfaced_tasks.title: Stop watering
surfaced_tasks.reason: Garlic harvest is 36 days out and the Jun 21 cutoff is 12 days away — exclude w3 from Rachio scheduling before Friday's 87°F advances curing further.

suggested_tasks.title: Check c2 gaps, replant quail-damaged spots
suggested_tasks.description: Day 12 since planting and the sprouting window closes this week — bare spots from the Jun 4 quail disturbance won't self-fill and need seeds now.
